system.name: Yogas Deep Dive - Planetary Combinations
system.description: Comprehensive guide to 100+ yogas (planetary combinations) with formation, strength, manifestation, and real-world outcomes
system.purpose: Understand special planetary combinations that create exceptional life results - wealth, power, fame, spirituality, or challenges
system.principle: Individual planets give results, but planetary COMBINATIONS (yogas) create extraordinary outcomes - for better or worse
system.importance: Yogas are what make charts unique - two people with similar planet placements can have vastly different lives due to yogas
system.scope: Raj Yogas (power), Dhana Yogas (wealth), Panch Mahapurusha Yogas (greatness), Nabhasa Yogas, Arishta Yogas (difficulties), special yogas
system.criticalUnderstanding: Yoga PRESENCE in chart doesn't guarantee results - strength assessment and activation timing critical
system.manifestation: Yogas manifest during relevant planet's dasha-antardasha periods - timing is everything

yogaPhilosophy.whatIsYoga: Yoga means 'combination' or 'union' - specific planetary relationships creating special effects beyond individual planet results
howYogasForm: House lord relationships - certain lords together create yogas
Sign placements - planets in specific signs
Conjunctions - planets together in same house/sign
Exchanges - two planets in each other's signs (Parivartana)
Special positions - planets in specific houses from lagna/Moon

strong: Planets involved are exalted, own sign, or well-placed
No malefic affliction to yoga-forming planets
Yoga visible in both D1 (birth chart) and D9 (Navamsha)
weak: Planets involved are debilitated, combust, or afflicted
Yoga only in D1 but not in D9
cancelled: Yoga-forming planet debilitated AND combust AND afflicted
Planet in enemy sign without strength

manifestationTiming.principle: Yoga manifests during dasha-antardasha of planets involved in yoga
manifestationTiming.example: Dhana Yoga formed by Jupiter-Venus: manifests in Jupiter Dasha or Venus Dasha or when both are in antardasha
manifestationTiming.transits: Supporting transits enhance yoga manifestation - Jupiter/Saturn transit over yoga planets or houses
manifestationTiming.age: Some yogas manifest early life, some middle age, some old age - depends on dasha sequence
manifestationTiming.activation: Yoga lies dormant until relevant dasha period - person may not even know they have it until it activates

rajYogas.name: Raj Yogas - Royal Combinations (Power and Status)
rajYogas.definition: Combinations giving power, authority, fame, high status, leadership - 'raj' means king/royal
rajYogas.principle: Formed by Kendra (1/4/7/10) and Trikona (1/5/9) lords connecting - angular+trinal lords = power

yogas.name: Dharma Karmadhipati Yoga
yogas.formation: 9th lord (dharma) and 10th lord (karma) in mutual aspect, conjunction, or exchange
yogas.strength: Strongest if both exalted or in angular houses, especially in 1st/10th
results: High position in career - often government or leadership roles
Ethical success - prosperity through righteous means
Fortune and luck in career matters
yogas.manifestation: 9th or 10th lord dasha-antardasha periods
yogas.example: Libra lagna: Mercury (9th lord) and Moon (10th lord) conjunct in 10th house = Powerful yoga for government service/authority
yogas.cancellation: If either planet debilitated or severely afflicted - yoga weakens significantly
yogas.celebrities: Common in charts of politicians, CEOs, high government officials

yogas.name: Yogakaraka Combination
yogas.formation: Planet ruling both Kendra (angular) and Trikona (trinal) houses - yogakaraka planet
yogas.applicableFor: Only certain lagnas have yogakaraka: Mars for Cancer/Leo lagna, Saturn for Taurus/Libra lagna, Venus for Capricorn/Aquarius lagna
yogas.strength: Strongest when yogakaraka planet exalted, in own sign, or in angular houses
yogas.manifestation: Throughout yogakaraka planet's dasha - often most successful period of life
yogas.example: Taurus lagna: Saturn rules 9th and 10th houses = Yogakaraka. Saturn in 10th house in Aquarius = Extremely powerful for career and fortune
yogas.note: Yogakaraka planet's gemstone often most beneficial for these lagnas (after expert consultation)
yogas.critical: One of MOST powerful single-planet yogas

yogas.name: Kahala Yoga
yogas.formation: 4th and 9th lords together OR aspecting each other, with 4th lord strong
yogas.strength: Strong if in angular houses, especially 4th or 10th
yogas.manifestation: 4th or 9th lord dashas
yogas.example: Aries lagna: Moon (4th lord) and Jupiter (9th lord) in conjunction = Determination and property fortune

yogas.name: Lakshmi Yoga
yogas.formation: 9th lord exalted or in own sign, placed in angular (1/4/7/10) or trinal (1/5/9) house
yogas.strength: Very strong if 9th lord is benefic planet (Jupiter, Venus, Mercury, Moon) and well-aspected
yogas.manifestation: 9th lord dasha, also general fortune throughout life
yogas.example: Sagittarius lagna: Sun (9th lord) exalted in Aries in 5th house = Fortune, ethical wealth, recognition

yogas.name: Viparita Raja Yoga
yogas.formation: Lords of dusthanas (6th/8th/12th) in dusthanas themselves, or in conjunction/exchange
yogas.principle: Double negative becomes positive - enemy in enemy's house destroys enemy
yogas.manifestation: During 6th/8th/12th lord dashas - often challenging periods that ultimately bring success
yogas.example: Cancer lagna: Jupiter (6th lord) in 8th house = Harsha Yoga - obstacles eventually lead to victory
yogas.note: Often gives success AFTER initial struggles - not immediate smooth success like other Raj Yogas
yogas.critical: Underrated yoga - very powerful for overcoming adversity

yogas.name: Neecha Bhanga Raja Yoga
yogas.formation: Debilitated planet's debilitation CANCELLED through specific conditions, turning weakness into strength
cancellationConditions: Debilitation lord exalted or in angular house
Debilitated planet aspected by its own sign lord or exaltation lord
Debilitated planet in angular house from lagna or Moon
Mutual exchange between debilitated planet and sign lord
yogas.manifestation: Debilitated planet's dasha - transforms from worst to best period
yogas.example: Moon debilitated in Scorpio in 10th house + Mars (Scorpio lord) in angular house = Cancellation - Career success after struggles
yogas.celebrities: Many self-made successful people have this yoga - represents overcoming birth disadvantages
yogas.strength: Stronger if multiple cancellation conditions present simultaneously

rajYogas.generalNote: Raj Yogas give status and power - but character and ethics still depend on individual planet placements and overall chart

dhanaYogas.name: Dhana Yogas - Wealth Combinations
dhanaYogas.definition: Combinations specifically giving wealth, prosperity, financial abundance - 'dhana' means wealth
dhanaYogas.principle: Formed by wealth house lords (2nd/11th/5th/9th) connecting with each other or with lagna lord

yogas.name: Dhana Yoga Basic
yogas.formation: 2nd lord (wealth) and 11th lord (gains) in mutual aspect, conjunction, or exchange
yogas.strength: Strongest if in 1st/2nd/5th/9th/11th houses and both planets strong
yogas.manifestation: 2nd or 11th lord dasha periods
yogas.example: Gemini lagna: Moon (2nd lord) and Mars (11th lord) in conjunction in 11th house = Strong wealth potential

yogas.name: Trilochana Yoga
yogas.formation: Sun, Moon, and Mars in trine (1-5-9) to each other
yogas.strength: Strong if all three in angular or trinal houses and unafflicted
results: Success in real estate and property
yogas.manifestation: Sun, Moon, or Mars dashas
yogas.example: Sun in 1st house, Moon in 5th house, Mars in 9th house = Wealth through authority and property

yogas.name: Chandra Mangala Yoga
yogas.formation: Moon and Mars in conjunction OR in mutual aspect
yogas.strength: Strongest in 1st/2nd/4th/5th/9th/11th houses, weaker in 6th/8th/12th
yogas.manifestation: Moon or Mars dasha periods
yogas.example: Moon and Mars conjunct in 2nd house = Direct wealth through property/business
yogas.note: Very common wealth yoga - present in many charts, strength varies
yogas.doshaConsideration: If Mars afflicting Moon too much, can cause emotional aggression - balance needed

yogas.name: Lakshmi Yoga (Wealth Specific)
yogas.formation: Venus (natural wealth significator) in own sign (Taurus/Libra) or exalted (Pisces) in angular house (1/4/7/10), with 9th lord connection
yogas.strength: Very strong if Venus aspected by benefics and 9th lord also strong
results: Wealth through Venusian means - arts, entertainment, beauty, luxury goods
yogas.manifestation: Venus dasha or 9th lord dasha
yogas.example: Venus in 10th house in Pisces (exalted) with 9th lord aspect = Wealth and luxury in career

yogas.name: Dhanvantari Yoga
yogas.formation: 2nd lord and 8th lord in conjunction or exchange, or 2nd and 11th lords with 5th/8th involvement
yogas.complexity: Complex yoga involving multiple wealth houses
results: Medical/healing profession wealth (Dhanvantari is medicine god)
yogas.manifestation: 2nd, 8th, or 11th lord dashas
yogas.example: 2nd lord in 8th house + 8th lord in 2nd house (exchange) = Inheritance or sudden wealth gains

yogas.name: Vasumati Yoga
yogas.formation: Benefic planets (Jupiter, Venus, Mercury, waxing Moon) in Upachaya houses (3rd/6th/10th/11th) from lagna or Moon
yogas.strength: Stronger with more benefics, especially in 10th and 11th
yogas.manifestation: Generally throughout life, peaks during benefic planet dashas
yogas.example: Jupiter in 10th, Venus in 11th, Mercury in 3rd = Continuous wealth growth through career

wealthFactors.essential: 2nd house (accumulated wealth), 11th house (income/gains), 5th house (speculation/intelligence), 9th house (fortune), lagna lord (self)
wealthFactors.D9Confirmation: Wealth yogas must be supported in Navamsha (D9) for full manifestation
wealthFactors.doshaBlock: If 2nd or 11th lord severely afflicted, yoga may not fully manifest - requires remedies

panchaMahapurushaYogas.name: Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas - Five Great Person Combinations
panchaMahapurushaYogas.definition: Five special yogas formed by five tara grahas (non-luminaries) in specific positions giving exceptional personality and success
panchaMahapurushaYogas.principle: Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn in own sign or exalted sign AND in angular house (1/4/7/10) from lagna
panchaMahapurushaYogas.importance: Creates extraordinary individuals with specific greatness - leadership, intellect, wisdom, charm, or discipline

yogas.name: Ruchaka Yoga (Mars)
yogas.formation: Mars in own sign (Aries/Scorpio) or exalted (Capricorn) in angular house (1/4/7/10) from lagna
yogas.strength: Strongest in 1st or 10th house, slightly weaker in 4th or 7th
physicalCharacteristics: Medium to tall height with good proportion
yogas.challenges: Can be too aggressive, impatient, prone to anger - needs to cultivate patience and diplomacy
yogas.manifestation: Mars dasha periods show peak results
yogas.example: Mars in Aries in 10th house = Military general, CEO with aggressive leadership, champion athlete
yogas.celebrities: Military leaders, sports champions, successful surgeons, bold entrepreneurs

yogas.name: Bhadra Yoga (Mercury)
yogas.formation: Mercury in own sign (Gemini/Virgo) or exalted (Virgo) in angular house (1/4/7/10) from lagna
yogas.strength: Strongest in 1st or 10th house, especially in Virgo (both own and exaltation)
physicalCharacteristics: Youthful appearance even in old age
career: Astrology and occult sciences (if other factors support)
results: Fame in literary or commercial fields
yogas.challenges: Can be too talkative, scattered in multiple directions, nervous energy - needs focus
yogas.manifestation: Mercury dasha periods show peak business success
yogas.example: Mercury in Virgo in 10th house = Successful businessman, renowned accountant, bestselling author
yogas.celebrities: Business tycoons, authors, journalists, teachers, successful traders
yogas.note: One of most common Mahapurusha yogas in successful business people

yogas.name: Hamsa Yoga (Jupiter)
yogas.formation: Jupiter in own sign (Sagittarius/Pisces) or exalted (Cancer) in angular house (1/4/7/10) from lagna
yogas.strength: Strongest in 1st or 10th house, Cancer exaltation particularly powerful
results: Fortune and good luck throughout life
Fame as teacher, advisor, or guide
yogas.challenges: Can be over-optimistic, gain weight, trust too easily - needs practical grounding
yogas.manifestation: Jupiter dasha periods most successful - often 16 years of continuous growth
yogas.example: Jupiter in Sagittarius in 10th house = Renowned professor, respected judge, spiritual teacher with followers
yogas.celebrities: Spiritual leaders, renowned teachers, judges, ethical business leaders, philosophers
yogas.note: Considered most benefic of Pancha Mahapurusha yogas - brings overall happiness

yogas.name: Malavya Yoga (Venus)
yogas.formation: Venus in own sign (Taurus/Libra) or exalted (Pisces) in angular house (1/4/7/10) from lagna
yogas.strength: Strongest in 1st or 4th house, Pisces exaltation most refined
results: Success in artistic and creative fields
Fame in arts or beauty industry
yogas.challenges: Can be too indulgent, superficial, pleasure-seeking - needs deeper purpose
yogas.manifestation: Venus dasha periods (20 years) - peak comfort and artistic success
yogas.example: Venus in Taurus in 1st house = Successful actor/actress, fashion designer, luxury brand owner
yogas.celebrities: Movie stars, fashion icons, musicians, artists, luxury entrepreneurs
yogas.note: Common in entertainment industry and those with extraordinary beauty/charm

yogas.name: Shasha Yoga (Saturn)
yogas.formation: Saturn in own sign (Capricorn/Aquarius) or exalted (Libra) in angular house (1/4/7/10) from lagna
yogas.strength: Strongest in 10th house (natural house of Saturn as karma), very powerful in Capricorn
physicalCharacteristics: Lean and tall or short but strong build
May look older than age or age well
personality: Strong sense of duty and karma
results: Success through hard work and persistence
yogas.challenges: Can be too serious, pessimistic, cold emotionally - needs warmth and optimism
yogas.manifestation: Saturn dasha periods (19 years) - slow but steady rise to authority
yogas.timing: Results come later in life - Saturn rewards with time, not immediately
yogas.example: Saturn in Capricorn in 10th house = Senior government official, respected judge, CEO through decades of work
yogas.celebrities: Long-serving leaders, disciplined achievers, self-made success stories
yogas.note: Results come LATE but are LASTING - builds stable empire through persistence
yogas.critical: Only Mahapurusha yoga that requires patience - others give faster results

generalConditions.strength: Yoga stronger if planet in own sign (Mars in Aries stronger than Mars in Capricorn exalted for some significations)
generalConditions.aspects: Beneficial aspects enhance, malefic aspects reduce (but don't cancel unless very severe)
generalConditions.combustion: If yoga-forming planet combust, yoga weakens significantly - not cancelled but reduced
generalConditions.retrograde: Retrograde doesn't cancel but delays manifestation
generalConditions.multipleYogas: Person can have 2-3 Mahapurusha yogas - becomes exceptionally successful with multiple strengths
generalConditions.D9Confirmation: Yoga must repeat or be supported in Navamsha for full manifestation
generalConditions.dashaActivation: Yoga dormant until relevant planet's dasha-antardasha

panchaMahapurushaYogas.rarity: Pancha Mahapurusha yogas relatively rare - only ~10-15% charts have even one of these yogas properly formed
panchaMahapurushaYogas.impact: When properly formed and strong, these yogas can elevate person to extraordinary status in their field

fameYogas.name: Fame and Recognition Yogas
fameYogas.principle: Specific combinations giving public recognition, popularity, celebrity status, mass appeal

yogas.name: Parijata Yoga
yogas.formation: Lagna lord in kendra (1/4/7/10) or trikona (1/5/9), and his sign dispositor also in kendra or trikona
yogas.strength: Very strong if both planets exalted or in own signs
results: Happy married life often accompanies fame
yogas.example: Leo lagna: Sun in 5th house in Sagittarius, Jupiter in 1st house = Fame through creativity

yogas.name: Mass Appeal Yoga
yogas.formation: Moon in 10th house aspected by Jupiter OR Moon-Jupiter conjunction in angular house
yogas.strength: Extremely strong if Moon full and Jupiter strong
results: Political success if other factors support
yogas.manifestation: Moon or Jupiter dashas
yogas.example: Moon in 10th house aspected by Jupiter = Movie star, political leader with mass following

yogas.name: Gaja Kesari Yoga
yogas.formation: Jupiter in kendra (1/4/7/10) from Moon
yogas.strength: Strongest if both Moon and Jupiter in own/exalted signs and unafflicted
yogas.manifestation: Jupiter or Moon dashas
yogas.note: VERY common yoga (present in 30-40% charts) but strength varies enormously - weak versions give limited results
yogas.example: Strong: Moon in Cancer 1st house + Jupiter in Libra 4th house = Renowned ethical leader
yogas.weakExample: Weak: Moon dark in Scorpio 8th + Jupiter debilitated in Capricorn 11th = Yoga present but weak results

yogas.name: Budh-Aditya Yoga
yogas.formation: Sun and Mercury conjunction (Mercury always close to Sun so common, but specific conditions enhance)
yogas.strength: Strong if in 1st/5th/9th/10th houses, Mercury not combust (more than 14 degrees from Sun), in friendly signs
results: Success in education and intellectual fields
yogas.challenges: If Mercury too close (combust under 10 degrees) - communication problems, ego-intellect conflict
yogas.manifestation: Sun or Mercury dashas
yogas.example: Sun-Mercury conjunction in 10th house in Leo, Mercury 15 degrees away = Famous intellectual, renowned author

yogas.name: Amala Yoga
yogas.formation: Benefic planet (Jupiter, Venus, Mercury, waxing Moon) in 10th house from lagna or Moon
yogas.strength: Very strong if benefic exalted or in own sign in 10th
results: Fame for good character and ethics
yogas.manifestation: Throughout life, peaks in benefic planet dashas
yogas.example: Jupiter in 10th house = Ethical leader respected by all, teacher with impeccable reputation

marriageYogas.name: Marriage and Relationship Yogas
marriageYogas.principle: Combinations affecting marriage timing, quality, and relationship harmony

yogas.name: Kalatra Yoga
yogas.formation: 7th lord strong (exalted, own sign, well-placed in kendra/trikona) with Venus support
yogas.strength: Very strong if 7th lord with Venus in benefic houses
yogas.manifestation: 7th lord or Venus dasha for marriage timing
yogas.example: 7th lord Venus exalted in Pisces in 9th house = Excellent spouse, marriage brings fortune

yogas.name: Early Marriage Yoga
yogas.formation: 7th lord in 1st/7th house, or 7th lord exalted, or Venus very strong in 7th, or 7th house with multiple benefics
yogas.results: Early marriage, often arranged, usually successful if planets strong
yogas.example: Venus exalted in 7th house = Marriage by age 22-23

yogas.name: Delayed Marriage Yoga
yogas.formation: 7th lord in 6th/8th/12th houses, or Saturn in 7th, or Sun in 7th (for women), or 7th lord debilitated
yogas.remedies: Fast 16 Fridays for Venus, worship Lakshmi-Parvati, help poor girls' marriages
yogas.example: Saturn in 7th house = Marriage delayed but stable once happens

yogas.name: Love Marriage Yoga
yogas.formation: 5th lord and 7th lord connected (conjunction, aspect, exchange), or Venus-Mars connection in 5th/7th houses
yogas.strength: Strong if in 1st/5th/7th/11th houses
yogas.challenges: Sometimes family opposition if malefics involved
yogas.example: 5th lord Venus and 7th lord Mars in exchange = Passionate love marriage

yogas.name: Multiple Marriages Yoga
yogas.formation: 7th house with multiple planets especially malefics, or 7th lord in 6th/8th/12th with Rahu/Mars, or Venus-Mars with Rahu in 7th
yogas.indication: More than one marriage - divorce and remarriage, or spouse death and remarriage
yogas.caution: Not definite - chart analysis needed for confirmation
yogas.example: Mars, Saturn, Rahu in 7th house = High likelihood of marital disruption

yogas.name: Happy Married Life Yoga
yogas.formation: Moon in 7th house (if strong), or 7th lord in 4th house, or Venus in 4th house, or 4th and 7th lords in mutual aspect
yogas.example: 7th lord in 4th house = Spouse brings home happiness, peaceful married life

yogas.name: Spouse Physical Beauty Yoga
yogas.formation: Venus strong and well-placed (especially in 1st/4th/7th/10th), or 7th lord exalted, or benefics in 7th house
yogas.example: Venus exalted in 7th house Pisces = Exceptionally beautiful/handsome spouse

yogas.name: Spouse Wealth Yoga
yogas.formation: 7th lord in 2nd/11th house, or 2nd lord in 7th house, or 7th lord with Jupiter, or 8th lord strong (spouse's family wealth)
yogas.results: Spouse from wealthy family or spouse brings financial prosperity
yogas.example: 7th lord Jupiter in 2nd house = Spouse from wealthy background or brings wealth

marriageYogas.compatibility: Marriage yogas show quantity/timing/quality - for true compatibility, synastry (inter-chart analysis) and Navamsha critical

spiritualYogas.name: Moksha and Spiritual Yogas
spiritualYogas.principle: Combinations indicating spiritual inclination, detachment, enlightenment potential, psychic abilities

yogas.name: Pravrajya Yoga (Renunciation)
yogas.formation: Multiple planets in 12th house, or 12th lord very strong, or Moon with Saturn/Ketu in 12th, or dispositors of ascendant lord and 10th lord in 12th or conjunction with 12th lord
yogas.strength: Stronger if Jupiter or Ketu involved, and 9th house also connected
yogas.manifestation: 12th lord or Ketu dasha periods - strong spiritual pull
yogas.caution: Can cause worldly difficulties if person tries to live material life - must embrace spiritual path
yogas.example: Moon, Saturn, Ketu in 12th house = Strong renunciation, monk or spiritual teacher
yogas.modernExpression: May not become monk but will have strong spiritual practice, minimalist lifestyle, service orientation

yogas.name: Sanyasa Yoga
yogas.formation: Four or more planets in one house, especially if including Saturn, or Sun/Moon with Saturn in 12th house
yogas.indication: Potential for complete renunciation of worldly life
yogas.results: Monastic life, complete detachment, spiritual teaching, ashram living
yogas.note: In modern times, often manifests as strong spiritual practice rather than literal monkhood

yogas.name: Moksha Yoga
yogas.formation: Ketu in 12th house with Jupiter aspect, or 12th lord in 9th house, or 9th lord in 12th house
yogas.manifestation: Ketu or 12th lord dasha - spiritual breakthroughs

yogas.name: Adhi Yoga (Spiritual + Material Success)
yogas.formation: Benefics (Jupiter, Venus, Mercury) in 6th, 7th, and 8th houses from Moon (all three houses occupied)
yogas.uniqueness: Combines spiritual depth with worldly success - householder spirituality
results: Success in life with spiritual understanding
yogas.manifestation: Throughout life, especially benefic dashas
yogas.ideal: Best yoga for spiritual person living in world - not needing renunciation

yogas.name: Kemadruma Yoga Cancellation = Spiritual Strength
yogas.formation: Normally Kemadruma (loneliness) forms when no planets on either side of Moon, but if cancelled by other factors, gives spiritual strength through initial isolation
yogas.results: Spiritual maturity through loneliness, inner strength, self-sufficiency, meditation ability

yogas.name: Saraswati Yoga
yogas.formation: Jupiter, Venus, Mercury in kendras/trikonas from lagna or from each other, with Jupiter strong
yogas.manifestation: Jupiter, Venus, or Mercury dashas
yogas.example: Jupiter in 1st, Venus in 5th, Mercury in 9th = Scholar, spiritual teacher, author of wisdom texts

yogas.name: Tapasvi Yoga
yogas.formation: Saturn and Ketu in 12th house, or Saturn aspecting 12th house with Ketu placement in moksha houses (4/8/12)
yogas.path: Difficult spiritual path - transformation through fire
yogas.example: Saturn-Ketu in 12th house = Ascetic life, intense spiritual practice, enlightenment through austerity

spiritualIndicators.planets: Ketu (detachment), Jupiter (wisdom), Saturn (discipline), 12th house (liberation), 9th house (dharma), 8th house (transformation)
spiritualIndicators.houses: Strong 4th (inner peace), 8th (mysticism), 9th (higher knowledge), 12th (moksha) indicate spiritual potential
spiritualIndicators.note: Strong spiritual yogas often accompanied by worldly challenges - path of renunciation vs householder path

amistaYogas.name: Arishta Yogas - Difficulty and Challenge Combinations
amistaYogas.principle: Yogas indicating obstacles, suffering, health issues, accidents, or major life challenges
amistaYogas.purpose: Awareness for remedies and conscious navigation - not fatalism

yogas.name: Kemadruma Yoga (Loneliness)
yogas.formation: No planets (except Sun, Rahu, Ketu) on either side of Moon (2nd and 12th from Moon empty)
cancellation: Planets in kendra from lagna (even if not from Moon)
yogas.remedies: Strengthen Moon - Pearl, Moon mantra, Shiva worship Mondays, meditation, spend time near water
yogas.positiveSide: If transformed consciously, develops inner strength and spiritual depth
yogas.example: Moon in 5th house, no planets in 4th or 6th houses = Emotional loneliness but self-sufficient

yogas.name: Daridra Yoga (Poverty)
yogas.formation: 11th lord in 6th/8th/12th houses, or 2nd lord severely afflicted with 11th lord weak
results: Hard work with little financial reward
yogas.remedies: Strengthen 2nd and 11th lords, Lakshmi worship, Jupiter remedies, charity despite poverty creates positive karma
yogas.note: Can be overcome with consistent effort and spiritual approach to wealth
yogas.caution: Should not cause fatalism - many with this yoga create wealth through extraordinary effort and remedies

yogas.name: Graha Yuddha (Planetary War)
yogas.formation: Two planets within 1 degree of each other (same longitude) - except Sun-Moon conjunction
yogas.impact: Planet with lower longitude 'wins', other 'loses' - losing planet gives negative results
yogas.results: Internal conflict in areas ruled by planets, struggles, confusion, setbacks in significations of losing planet
yogas.remedies: Strengthen losing planet through specific remedies - gemstone, mantra, deity worship
yogas.example: Mars at 15°20' and Mercury at 15°45' in same sign = Mercury loses - business/communication struggles with aggressive tendencies

yogas.name: Angarak Yoga (Fire and Blood)
yogas.formation: Mars and Rahu conjunction
yogas.remedies: CRITICAL - Hanuman Chalisa daily mandatory, Durga worship, avoid alcohol/drugs, anger management therapy essential, avoid risks
yogas.severity: House and sign placement determines severity - worse in 1st/4th/7th/8th houses
yogas.example: Mars-Rahu in 1st house = Accident-prone, aggressive, needs extreme caution and remedies

yogas.name: Guru Chandal Yoga
yogas.formation: Jupiter conjunct with Rahu or Ketu
yogas.controversy: Some consider it very negative, others say it can give unconventional wisdom
yogas.positive: Can give out-of-box thinking, revolutionary ideas, breaking outdated traditions
yogas.remedies: Strengthen Jupiter - Yellow Sapphire (if suitable), Jupiter mantra, Vishnu worship, respect teachers, maintain ethics strictly
yogas.example: Jupiter-Rahu in 5th house = Unconventional intelligence, children through unusual circumstances, innovative education methods

yogas.name: Vish Yoga (Poison)
yogas.formation: Saturn and Moon conjunction, especially if both weak
results: Mother's health issues or difficult relationship
yogas.remedies: ESSENTIAL - Hanuman Chalisa daily, strengthen Moon (Pearl, Moon mantra, Shiva worship), strengthen Saturn (service, patience), professional mental health support
yogas.caution: High depression risk - therapy and medication if needed absolutely essential
yogas.example: Saturn-Moon in 1st house = Chronic depression, needs lifelong mental health management and spiritual practices

yogas.name: Shakata Yoga
yogas.formation: Moon in 6th/8th from Jupiter
yogas.remedies: Strengthen Jupiter and Moon, Lakshmi-Vishnu worship, financial planning and savings essential
yogas.note: Not complete poverty but lack of stability - need financial discipline
yogas.example: Moon in Taurus, Jupiter in Scorpio (6/8 relationship) = Fluctuating finances, good periods followed by challenges

yogas.name: Durudhara Yoga from Papa Grahas
yogas.formation: Malefics (Mars, Saturn, Rahu, Ketu) on both sides of Moon (2nd and 12th from Moon)
yogas.remedies: Strengthen Moon massively, meditation essential, professional support for mental health
yogas.note: Opposite of Sunapha/Anapha yogas (benefics around Moon which is positive)

amistaYogas.importantNote: Arishta yogas are WARNING SIGNS, not fixed fate - with awareness, remedies, effort, and professional help where needed, severity can be reduced 60-80%
amistaYogas.approach: Don't fear these yogas - use as motivation for proactive remedies and conscious living

yogas.name: Parvata Yoga (Mountain)
yogas.formation: Benefics in kendras, and no malefics in kendras, and lagna lord strong
results: Steady rise to prominence like mountain
yogas.example: Jupiter in 1st, Venus in 7th, Mercury in 10th, no malefics in kendras = Gradual but steady success

yogas.name: Pushkala Yoga
yogas.formation: Lagna lord exalted and Jupiter in own sign in kendra
yogas.rarity: Relatively rare as requires both conditions simultaneously

yogas.name: Harsha-Sarala-Vimala (Viparita Subset)
yogas.formation: 6th/8th/12th lords in houses 6th/8th/12th (various combinations)
yogas.results: Success through adversity, victory over obstacles, gains from unexpected sources
yogas.note: Already covered in Raj Yogas section as Viparita Raja Yoga

yogas.name: Kesari Yoga
yogas.formation: Moon in 4th house with Jupiter aspecting it, or Moon-Jupiter in 4th house
yogas.example: Moon in 4th in Cancer with Jupiter aspect = Beautiful home, mother's love, emotional fulfillment

yogas.name: Akhanda Samrajya Yoga
yogas.formation: Jupiter in 2nd/5th/11th house from Moon, with lagna lord strong
yogas.rarity: Rare and very powerful - creates lasting legacy

yogas.name: Shankha Yoga
yogas.formation: 5th and 6th lords in mutual kendras, and lagna lord strong
yogas.note: Named after conch shell (Shankha) - auspicious symbol

yogas.name: Bheri Yoga
yogas.formation: Venus, Jupiter, and lagna lord in mutual kendras or trikonas
yogas.note: Named after kettle drum (Bheri) - announces prosperity

yogas.name: Kartari Yoga (Hemming)
yogas.formation: Planet or house hemmed between two malefics (Mars, Saturn, Rahu, Ketu on either side)
results: Obstacles in significations of hemmed planet/house
yogas.remedies: Strengthen hemmed planet, strengthen malefics constructively, protective measures
yogas.opposite: Shubha Kartari - hemmed between benefics - very auspicious
yogas.example: Sun in 10th with Saturn in 9th and Mars in 11th = Career pressures and obstacles, authority challenged

yogas.name: Chamara Yoga
yogas.formation: Two benefic planets in lagna, 7th, 9th, or 10th house
yogas.note: Named after royal flywhisk (Chamara) - symbol of royalty

yogas.name: Akriti Yogas (Shape Yogas)
yogas.concept: Yogas formed by planets occupying houses in specific patterns creating visual shapes
yogas.types: Yuga, Gola, Shoola, Kedara, Pasha, Dama, Veena, Dhanuh, Shara, etc. - over 32 types
yogas.impact: Subtle influences on personality and life patterns
yogas.note: Advanced topic - less commonly used than main yogas

yogaStrengthAssessment.name: How to Assess Yoga Strength in a Chart
yogaStrengthAssessment.principle: Yoga presence doesn't guarantee results - strength assessment critical

steps.action: Check sign placement of all yoga planets first

assessment: Dusthana houses (6/8/12) = Weakest, often yoga cancelled
steps.action: Yoga in kendras most powerful, in dusthanas weakest

assessment: Benefic aspects (Jupiter, Venus, Mercury, waxing Moon) strengthen yoga (+)
Malefic aspects (Saturn, Mars, Rahu, Ketu) weaken yoga (-)
Multiple malefic aspects may cancel yoga (--)
steps.action: Check what aspects yoga-forming planets receive

assessment: Within 10 degrees of Sun = Severely weakened
steps.exception: Mercury and Venus less affected by combustion in their own signs
steps.action: If yoga planet combust, yoga significantly weakened

impact: Retrograde planet stronger in giving results (Chesta Bala)
But manifestation delayed and may be unconventional
Retrograde Saturn, Mars need careful assessment
steps.action: Retrograde doesn't cancel but modifies manifestation

steps.critical: Yoga MUST repeat or be supported in D9 for full manifestation
assessment: Same yoga in D9 = Full manifestation (100%)
Yoga planets strong in D9 = Good manifestation (70-80%)
Yoga planets weak in D9 = Reduced manifestation (40-50%)
Yoga planets debilitated in D9 = Minimal manifestation (20-30%)
steps.action: Always check D9 for yoga confirmation - CRITICAL step

timing: Yoga manifests during dasha-antardasha of involved planets
If yoga planet dasha already passed = Yoga may not manifest in this life
If yoga planet dasha upcoming = Await activation
During transit = Temporary activation when transiting planets trigger yoga
steps.action: Check when yoga-forming planets dashas occur in life

yogaBhanga: Yoga-forming planet debilitated AND combust AND severely afflicted = Cancelled
Contradictory yogas of equal strength = Cancel each other
Dashas passed without activation = Practically cancelled for this life
steps.action: Check if multiple strong cancellation factors present

factors: Jupiter and Moon both exalted: +10 points
Jupiter in kendra from Moon: +5 points (yoga formation)
Both in angular houses from lagna: +5 points
Relevant dashas in working age: +5 points
Total: 35 points out of 35 = EXTREMELY STRONG yoga
interpretation: 20-24 points = Moderate, noticeable but not life-defining
Below 15 = Very weak, may not manifest meaningfully

practicalGuidance.name: Practical Use of Yogas in Chart Reading
guidelines: Focus on strongest 3-5 yogas in chart - not all yogas equally important
Raj Yogas and Dhana Yogas most impactful for worldly success
Pancha Mahapurusha yogas if present define personality and life path
Arishta yogas identify areas needing remedies and conscious effort
Check dasha periods - yoga dormant until activated
D9 confirmation non-negotiable for major yogas
Remedies can enhance positive yogas and mitigate negative yogas
Yogas show potential - free will and effort determine actual outcomes
Don't get overwhelmed by yoga count - strength matters more than quantity
Professional astrologer consultation essential for accurate yoga assessment

conclusion.understanding: Yogas are planetary combinations creating special life circumstances - both opportunities and challenges
conclusion.power: Strong yogas can elevate ordinary chart to extraordinary life - weak yogas may not manifest at all
conclusion.assessment: Yoga PRESENCE less important than yoga STRENGTH - 8-step assessment critical
conclusion.timing: Yogas activate during relevant planet dashas - timing is everything in manifestation
conclusion.navamsha: D9 confirmation essential - yoga in D1 only gives 40-50% results without D9 support
conclusion.remedies: Positive yogas can be enhanced through planetary strengthening, negative yogas mitigated through specific remedies
conclusion.balance: Look for both positive and negative yogas - complete picture needed
conclusion.freeWill: Yogas show karmic potential and timing - conscious effort and right action determine how potential manifests
conclusion.holistic: Yogas are one piece of chart analysis - must integrate with planets, houses, dashas, divisional charts for complete understanding
conclusion.hope: Even difficult charts with Arishta yogas have hidden strengths - every chart has some positive yogas to activate
conclusion.wisdom: Best yoga is right living combined with sincere effort - planetary yogas support this foundation, not replace it
